lingala.is_where_most_people_start_fingers_res: ezali esika bato mingi babandaka — misapi epemaka na a, s, d, f  ·  j, k, l, ;
lingala.button_dyslexia_font_audio_cues_high_c: . Police ya dyslexie, bilembo ya lokito, contraste makasi, clavier na bafungola minene, mpe mosusu — yango nde biloko yango moko, ezali esika ya kokitela te.
lingala.no_timers_no_races_no_streak_punishmen: Minuteur te, momekano te, etumbu ya série te. Kende na mbangu na yo. Sukisa ntango nyonso.
lingala.drill_ai_writes_practice_text_at_your_: — AI ekomaka lisolo ya momesano na niveau ya kelasi na yo mpo na eloko nyonso oyo osepelaka na yango. Pelisa
lingala.and_it_will_illustrate_what_you_type: mpe ekosala elilingi ya oyo ozali kokoma.
lingala.can_change_the_row_of_colored_swatches: ekoki kobongwana — molɔngɔ ya balangi na likolo ebongolaka kati na thème 5. To finá
lingala.a_clinician_or_teacher_can_set_an_iep_: Monganga to molakisi akoki kotia mokano ya IEP mpe kobimisa bokoli uta na
lingala.unique_calendar_days_with_at_least_one: Mikolo ya calendrier ekeseni na ata session moko na mikolo 30 eleki. Foti ezali te mpo na mikolo ya bopemi.
lingala.e_g_week_4_spelling_list_iep_sight_wor: ndakisa, "Liste ya orthographe ya pɔsɔ 4", "Maloba ya komona ya IEP"
lingala.type_or_paste_the_text_plain_letters_n: Koma to kotisa lisolo. Balɛtɛlɛ ya pamba, mituya, mpe bilembo ya kokoma oyo eyebani esalaka malamu koleka.
lingala.this_session_won_t_be_saved_no_pressur: — session oyo ekobombama te. Pression te, dossier te.
lingala.or_press_space_or_enter_to_begin_press: To finá Space to Enter mpo na kobanda. Finá Esc ntango nyonso na kati ya drill mpo na kobima.
lingala.passage_generator_hero: Motó ya esaleli ya kosala lisolo
lingala.non_english_passages_use_ascii_only_no: Masolo oyo ezali ya Anglais te esalelaka kaka ASCII (accent / tilde te) mpo bafungola ya clavier ya pamba etikala eloko ya momesano.
lingala.e_g_space_dogs_minecraft_the_ocean_mai: ndakisa, likoló, bambwa, Minecraft, mbu, malili ya Maine
lingala.hand_written_passage_sets_that_work_wi: Masangá ya masolo oyo ekomami na lobɔkɔ oyo esalaka na AI te. Masolo oyo ekɔtisami esangani na library na yo; lisolo se moko pɔsɔ na pɔsɔ ezali moboko ya sembo mingi mpo na bokoli ya IEP koleka lisolo oyo esalemi lisusu.
lingala.recently_generated_passages_drill_any_: Masolo oyo esalemi kala mingi te. Salá drill ya moko na yango mpo na kosalela lisusu. Oyo ya kala mingi ebimaka soki osali ya 9.
lingala.no_text_loaded_for_this_drill: Lisolo ekɔtisami te mpo na drill oyo.
lingala.pace_over_time_10_second_buckets: Mbangu na ntango · bakɛti ya segɔnde 10
lingala.each_bar_chars_typed_in_a_10_second_wi: Barre moko na moko = balɛtɛlɛ oyo ekomami na fenêtre ya segɔnde 10. Tiá souris likolo mpo na komona WPM pene-pene.
lingala.your_answer_helps_teachers_see_when_th: Eyano na yo esalisaka balakisi bámona ntango mituya elobaka lisolo mobimba te.
lingala.how_did_this_session_go_started_slow_p: Session oyo elekaki ndenge nini? "Nabandaki malɛmbɛ, nakobaki, nasalelaki slow-motion mode..."
lingala.note_saved_with_this_session_it_will_a: Note ebombami na session oyo. Ekomonana na rapport ya IEP mpe na kobimisa CSV.
lingala.refine_the_last_image_using_image_to_i: Bongisa elilingi ya nsuka na kosalelaka image-to-image na esika ya kobanda uta na ebandeli
lingala.download_this_image_as_a_png_file: Kitisa elilingi oyo lokola fichier PNG
lingala.recent_tap_to_restore: Ya sika · finá mpo na kozongisa
lingala.retry_the_same_text_to_beat_your_score: Meka lisusu lisolo se moko mpo na koleka score na yo
lingala.shows_the_full_passage_for_this_many_s: Elakisaka lisolo mobimba mpo na basegɔnde oyo liboso ete kokoma ebanda. Esalisaka bayekoli oyo bazwaka litomba na kotánga liboso, na nsima kosala. Moyekoli akoki koleka botángi ya mituya ntango nyonso.
lingala.after_this_many_minutes_of_active_typi: Nsima ya baminutɛ oyo ya kokoma ya solo (ntango ya kosukisa etangami te), lakisa bokundoli ya boboto mpo na kopema. Esalemaka mbala moko na drill moko na moko. Ekufi na ebandeli.
lingala.swap_the_whole_look_of_the_tool_high_c: Bongola emonaneli mobimba ya esaleli. Mode ya contraste makasi eleki bathème. Kawaii ezali thème ya pole; misusu ezali ya molili.
lingala.swap_the_highlight_color_used_for_the_: Bongola langi ya bongengisi oyo esalelami mpo na lɛtɛlɛ ya sikoyo, babuton, mpe bilembo ya ntina. Mpo na bayekoli oyo bamonaka bule ezali malili mingi to balingi balangi ya moto mpo na bokebi. Mode ya contraste makasi eleki oyo.
lingala.prefer_shorter_or_longer_drill_texts_s: Pona masolo ya drill mikuse to milai. "Mokuse" esalisaka bayekoli oyo bazali na mokakatano ya bokebi to bolɛmbu; "Molai" ezali mpo na bayekoli oyo batongaka mpiko. Soki drill ezali na échantillon oyo ekokani na boponi te, ezongaka na nyonso.
lingala.pace_target_optional_rhythm_reference: Mokano ya mbangu (référence ya rythme, soki olingi)
lingala.a_soft_pulsing_dot_on_the_drill_screen: Litɔnɔ ya boboto oyo ebɛtaka na écran ya drill elakisaka rythme ya makasi. Etumbu EZALI TE mpo na kokende malɛmbɛ — oyo ezali référence, ezali délai te. Esalisaka na kobongisa mouvement. Ekufi na ebandeli.
lingala.this_is_your_space_why_are_you_practic: Oyo ezali esika na yo. Mpo na nini ozali komesana? Mokano na yo ya lelo ezali nini? Ekeseni na mokano ya IEP ya monganga.
lingala.why_i_m_practicing_shown_on_menu: Mpo na nini nazali komesana (elakisami na menu)
lingala.e_g_typing_feels_hard_now_but_i_m_goin: ndakisa, "Kokoma ezali makasi sikoyo, kasi nakokoka kokoma masolo na ngai moko." · "Nalingi kotindela nkɔkɔ na ngai email kozanga ete mama na ngai asalisa ngai." · "Kokoma mbangu = ntango moke ya mosala ya ndako."
lingala.today_s_goal_is_yours_not_counted_agai: Mokano ya lelo ezali ya yo — etangami na yo te soki ozangi yango. Ebandaka lisusu yango moko lobi.
lingala.set_an_iep_style_goal_here_it_shows_up: Tiá mokano ya lolenge ya IEP awa. Emonanaka na écran ya drill mpe etondisaka rapport ya bokoli liboso. Esengeli kaka soki ozali kosala banote ya officiel ya bokoli.
lingala.e_g_j_d_initials_only_ferpa_safe: ndakisa, J.D. (kaka balɛtɛlɛ ya liboso, ebateli FERPA)
lingala.use_initials_or_a_pseudonym_alloflow_i: Salelá balɛtɛlɛ ya liboso to nkombo ya lokuta — AlloFlow esalemi mpo etikala na ebateli ya FERPA.
lingala.e_g_prefers_home_row_with_large_key_ke: ndakisa, Aponaka home-row na clavier ya bafungola minene; kitisa mabunga liboso ya kobakisa mbangu.
lingala.save_the_accommodations_iep_goal_audio: Bomba accommodations + mokano ya IEP + thème ya lokito na JSON, to kɔtisa profil uta na esaleli mosusu. EKOPI historique ya session TE — yango etikalaka mpo na moyekoli moko na moko.
lingala.full_backup_includes_sessions_personal: Backup mobimba ezali na basession, record ya malamu koleka, boyebi, carte ya mabunga, mpe balibrary mibale — dossier mobimba ya moyekoli. Salelá oyo liboso ya kolongola données ya navigateur to kobongola esaleli.
lingala.your_personal_growth_path_no_peer_comp: Nzela na yo ya bokoli. Bokokanisi na baninga te — oyo ezali kaka yo, na boumeli ya ntango.
lingala.affects_trend_report_csv_skill_tree_st: Etali tendance, rapport, CSV. Nzete ya mayele etikalaka ya ntango nyonso.
lingala.add_or_edit_a_note_saves_on_blur_or_ct: Bakisa to bongisa note. Ebombaka soki obimi to na Ctrl+Enter.
lingala.session_comparison_older_newer: ⇆ Bokokanisi ya session (ya kala → ya sika)
lingala.green_improvement_red_regression_gray_: Δ ya vert = bobongwani · motane = bozongi nsima · gris = bosambisi esalemi te (boumeli, motango ya accommodations).
lingala.top_error_keys_by_drill_all_time: Bafungola ya mabunga mingi na drill · ntango nyonso
lingala.different_drills_surface_different_wea: Badrill ekeseni ebimisaka bolɛmbu ekeseni. Salelá oyo mpo na kopona badrill oyo etali bafungola ya mikakatano.
lingala.these_celebrate_trying_accommodations_: Oyo esepelaka na komeka accommodations — kobomba yango te. Kosalela oyo esalisaka ezali makasi, ezali bolɛmbu te.
lingala.average_wpm_with_each_accommodation_on: WPM ya katikati na accommodation moko na moko epelisami vs ekufi. Bosangisi na balolenge nyonso ya drill — bosangani ya badrill ekoki kobulunganisa, yango wana salelá bokabwani ya drill moko na moko na rapport ya se mpo na bikateli ya ntina.
lingala.progress_report_iep_ready: Rapport ya bokoli (ebongi mpo na IEP)
lingala.tap_the_report_to_select_all_or_use_th: Finá rapport mpo na kopona nyonso, to salelá babuton ya se.
lingala.copy_a_2_4_sentence_plain_language_sum: Kopi bokuse ya bafraze 2-4 na monɔkɔ ya pete mpo na email ya moboti
lingala.complete_your_first_drill_to_see_your_: Silisa drill na yo ya liboso mpo na komona moboko na yo, tendance, mpe rapport ya IEP awa.
lingala.no_sessions_match_the_current_filter: 🔎 Session moko te ekokani na filtre ya sikoyo.
lingala.move_between_drill_cards_and_nav_butto: Tambola kati ya bakarte ya drill mpe babuton ya navigation
lingala.activate_the_focused_drill_card: Pelisa karte ya drill oyo eponami
lingala.repeat_your_last_drill_fast_jump: Zongela drill na yo ya nsuka (kopumbwa mbangu)
lingala.start_today_s_drill_of_the_day: Banda drill ya mokolo ya lelo
lingala.on_the_drill_intro_screen: Na écran ya bokɔtisi ya drill
lingala.on_any_screen_with_a_form: Na écran nyonso oyo ezali na formulaire
lingala.move_to_next_field_button: Kende na champ / buton oyo elandi
lingala.everything_in_typing_practice_can_be_r: Eloko nyonso na kati ya Momesano ya Kokoma ekoki kokómama na clavier — esalemi bongo mpo na basaleli ya screen-reader mpe accommodations ya kobongisa mouvement.
lingala.accommodation_toggles_on_the_drill_int: Babongoli ya accommodations na écran ya bokɔtisi ya drill ekoki kokómama mobimba na clavier na nzela ya Tab — souris esengeli te mpo na eteni moko ya esaleli oyo.
lingala.optional_game_mode_words_rise_from_the: Mode ya lisano soki olingi. Maloba emataka uta na se; koma liloba ya likolo mpo na kolongola yango. Soki likundu ekómi na plafond lisano esili. Leaderboard te, foti ya série te — kaka record ya malamu koleka.
lingala.each_theme_has_a_mascot_who_shows_up_i: Thème moko na moko ezali na mascotte oyo emonanaka na terrain ya lisano, na menu, mpe na écran ya bokuse. Bayanolaka na oyo ozali kosala — combo, likama, botumbi, mpongi, elonga, bokweyi.
lingala.choose_an_attack_word_to_send_to_the_b: Pona liloba ya botumbi mpo na kotindela bot
lingala.attack_ready_pick_a_word_to_send: ⚡ BOTUMBI EBONGI — pona liloba ya kotinda
lingala.tap_a_card_or_press_1_2_3_to_send_pres: Finá karte TO finá 1 / 2 / 3 mpo na kotinda. Finá Esc mpo na koleka mpe kotinda te. Likundu na yo ekangami ntango ozali kopona.
lingala.paused_both_stacks_frozen_press_resume: ⏸ Esukisami — makundu nyonso mibale ekangami. Finá Kokoba to Esc mpo na kokoba.
lingala.build_foundation_slow_accurate_beats_f: Tonga moboko. Malɛmbɛ + sembo elekaka mbangu + bozangi bokebi.
lingala.steady_progression_maintain_accuracy_f: Bokoli ya makasi. Batelá niveau ya se ya bosikisiki.
lingala.speed_accuracy_in_productive_band_sust: Mbangu + bosikisiki na bande ya mbuma. Momesano ya bolai.
lingala.high_wpm_achieved_diminishing_returns_: WPM ya likolo ekómi. Litomba ekiti uta na mbangu.
lingala.speed_exceeded_accuracy_budget_backtra: Mbangu eleki budget ya bosikisiki. Zonga na mokano ya malɛmbɛ.
lingala.wpm_accuracy_tradeoff_discovery: ⚡ Bokundoli ya boyokani kati ya WPM mpe bosikisiki
lingala.five_sliders_tune_your_practice_target: Ba-slider mitano ebongisaka mokano ya momesano na yo. Widget ekabolaka zone na yo na moko ya bikelamu 5 ekeseni mpe esalaka Pareto frontier ya WPM-bosikisiki. Score ezali te na bobongisi na yo — boluki ezali na koluka bisika ya momesano ya bolai.
lingala.pareto_curve_best_accuracy_achievable_: Pareto curve = bosikisiki ya malamu koleka oyo ekoki kozwama na WPM moko na moko. Likolo = ezali ya solo te; na se = esika ya kokola ezali.
lingala.hypothesis_free_text_what_is_your_sust: Likanisi (lisolo ya bonsomi): Mokano na yo ya bolai ezali nini? Niveau ya se ya bosikisiki ebongolaka WPM ya solo ndenge nini?
lingala.set_wpm_80_accuracy_98_realistic_compa: Tiá WPM=80, bosikisiki=98. Ezali ya solo? Kokanisa na elembo ya zone na yo.
lingala.drop_accuracy_floor_to_80_does_effecti: Kitisa niveau ya se ya bosikisiki tii 80%. WPM ya solo emataka?
lingala.pros_sustain_95_at_70_wpm_investigate_: Bato ya mayele babatelaka 95%+ na WPM 70+. Luka banzela ya formation nini ekómisaka kuna.
lingala.a_slower_target_with_high_accuracy_may: Mokano ya malɛmbɛ na bosikisiki ya likolo ekoki kobimisa masolo mingi na session moko na moko. Meka.
lingala.i_understand_the_tradeoff_explain_in_o: Nasosoli boyokani — limbola na maloba na yo moko
lingala.explain_in_your_own_words_how_do_wpm_a: Limbola na maloba na yo moko: WPM, bosikisiki, mpe makasi ya mouvement esalaka esika moko ndenge nini? Pareto frontier elakisi nini mpo na momesano ya kokoma?
lingala.design_note_discrete_5_zone_marker_par: Note ya design: elembo ya bazone 5 ekeseni; Pareto curve elakisaka esika ya boyokani; mokano "ya sembo" ezali te — esalemi bongo na nko.
